outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump presses Macron for French Navy deployment to Hormuz as oil nears $100
outlets.summary: Trump's Truth Social call for French Navy backing escalates pressure days before April 22 ceasefire expiry. Brent $95.42, oil analysts warn $110 possible if strait stays closed.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Ceasefire means Netanyahu can't keep promises, many Israelis say as elections loom
outlets.summary: Israeli domestic politics under strain as ceasefire limits Netanyahu's ability to deliver on war promises. Polls show declining support for continued conflict.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump tells NewsNation ceasefire extension 'highly unlikely' unless Iran accepts terms
outlets.summary: Trump NewsNation interview: ceasefire extension past April 22 'highly unlikely.' Hegseth reiterates 'locked and loaded' posture. IDF advances toward Bint Jbeil.

outlets.name: Daily Caller
outlets.headline: Trump announces US Navy seized blockade-defying Iranian cargo vessel after 'blowing a hole' in engine room
outlets.summary: Trump announces USS Spruance seizure of Iranian ship Touska. First ship physically taken under US blockade. Iran fires drones at US ships in retaliation.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran parliament drafts Hormuz tolls and transit-ban bill as ceasefire nears expiry
outlets.summary: Iran parliament considers transit fees and total ban for hostile-flag vessels through Hormuz. FM Araghchi brands US 'not serious.' IDF units within kilometers of Bint Jbeil.

outlets.name: BBC/CBC
outlets.headline: Iran vows retaliation after accusing U.S. of 'armed piracy' amid duelling blockades
outlets.summary: Focus on dual US-Iran blockade creating maritime crisis. Khatam al-Anbiya vows response. Diplomacy collapsed.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Netanyahu tells Milei 'war not over' even as ceasefire deadline approaches
outlets.summary: PM Netanyahu in joint appearance with Argentina's Milei says war will continue until full objectives met. IDF operations near Bint Jbeil intensify. Reservist killed by IED earlier in day.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Lebanese lawmaker accuses Israel of destruction in 39 southern Lebanon villages
outlets.summary: Satellite imagery confirms 1,400+ buildings demolished. IDF kills Hezbollah operative at Yellow Line. Reservist Porat killed by IED.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran pushed back enemy using asymmetric warfare strategy: Qalibaf
outlets.summary: Qalibaf warns US minesweepers will be fired upon. Claims 'progress' in talks while military 'fully prepared.' Iran rejects US demands as 'childish.'

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: FM Araghchi: Washington 'not serious' — no Round 2 while blockade continues
outlets.summary: FM Araghchi publicly confirms Iran will not participate in Islamabad Round 2. Says US posture including continued naval blockade and 'excessive demands' proves Washington is 'not serious about diplomacy.'
